moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: Today is the final day of the Formula 1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone, with the main race taking place.

angles.name: Race Buzz
angles.copy: It's lights out and away we go! The F1 British Grand Prix is happening today at Silverstone. Who are you backing for the win?

angles.name: UK Pride
angles.copy: Home advantage? The British Grand Prix race is today, bringing all the speed and drama to Silverstone. Come on, Lando/George!

moments.title: Wimbledon Second Week Begins
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships, Wimbledon, kicks off today, with intense matches as players vie for a spot in the later rounds.

angles.name: Tennis Action
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are ready! It's the start of the second week at Wimbledon, meaning the action is heating up. Who's making it to the finals?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Into the second week at Wimbledon! Are our British hopefuls still in with a chance? Every serve and volley counts now.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals Stage
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing, and today marks a crucial stage with teams battling it out in the Quarter-finals.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Finals time at the FIFA World Cup! Who's going through to the semis? The tension is building!

angles.name: Big Game Today
angles.copy: Massive games today in the World Cup Quarter-Finals. Don't miss a minute of the action as teams fight for a place in the next round.

moments.title: Huey Lewis is 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for hits like 'The Power of Love' and 'Heart and Soul', turns 76 today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Huey
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track? #HueyLewis

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: He's still got 'The Power of Love'! Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis today!

moments.title: RZA is 57
moments.blurb: RZA, influential rapper and producer, best known as the de facto leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday today.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA! Wu-Tang Clan ain't nothing to mess with. What's your favourite RZA-produced track?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the 57th birthday of a hip-hop icon, RZA! From Wu-Tang to solo genius, his influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Ed Kowalczyk is 55
moments.blurb: Ed Kowalczyk, lead singer of the alternative rock band Live, known for their 90s hits, turns 55 today.

angles.name: Live's Voice
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to Ed Kowalczyk, the powerful voice of Live! 'Lightning Crashes' is still a classic. What's your favourite Live song?

angles.name: 90s Rock Legend
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Ed Kowalczyk, turning 55 today! A true 90s rock legend.

moments.title: 50 Cent is 51
moments.blurb: Curtis James Jackson III, better known as 50 Cent, the Grammy-winning rapper and entrepreneur, celebrates his 51st birthday tomorrow, July 6.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 tomorrow. What's your favourite track from the hip-hop mogul?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st to 50 Cent for tomorrow! Still making waves in music and business.

moments.title: Ringo Starr is 86
moments.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, legendary drummer of The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Peace and love! The iconic Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his drumming?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr this Tuesday! A true legend of music.

moments.title: Beck is 56
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician Beck, known for his eclectic style, will be celebrating his 56th birthday on July 8.

angles.name: Loser, But a Winner
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the incredibly talented Beck on Wednesday! What's your favourite genre-bending track from him?

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the 56th birthday of alternative icon Beck this Wednesday! From 'Loser' to 'Dreams', he's always pushed boundaries.

moments.title: Courtney Love is 62
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, lead singer of Hole and a prominent figure in 90s alternative rock, turns 62 on July 9.

angles.name: Hole's Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love this Thursday! Which Hole anthem is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 62nd to the one and only Courtney Love on Thursday! A true queen of grunge.

moments.title: Jack White is 51
moments.blurb: Jack White, the acclaimed musician known for The White Stripes and his solo work, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9.

angles.name: White Stripes Legend
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White this Thursday! From 'Seven Nation Army' to his solo brilliance, a modern rock legend.

angles.name: Rock Architect
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st to Jack White on Thursday! An innovator and rock architect.

moments.title: Jessica Simpson is 46
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson, who rose to fame in the late 90s and early 00s, turns 46 on July 10.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to the one and only Jessica Simpson this Friday! What's your favourite pop hit from her?

angles.name: Reality Star & Singer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 46th to Jessica Simpson on Friday! From pop charts to reality TV, she's done it all.

moments.title: Gareth Gates is 42
moments.blurb: British pop singer and Pop Idol runner-up Gareth Gates, known for his 00s hits, celebrates his 42nd birthday on July 12.

angles.name: Pop Idol Fave
angles.copy: Happy 42nd Birthday to Gareth Gates this Sunday! Remember his Pop Idol days and hit singles? What was your favourite?

angles.name: Spirit in the Sky
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 42nd to Gareth Gates on Sunday! Still got 'Spirit in the Sky' stuck in our heads!

moments.title: Suzanne Vega is 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for her folk-inspired music and hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 11.

angles.name: Luka's Legacy
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega this Saturday! 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner' are timeless. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th to Suzanne Vega on Saturday! A unique voice in folk music.

moments.title: Richie Sambora is 67
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the iconic lead guitarist of Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Richie Sambora this Saturday! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar riff?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th to guitar legend Richie Sambora on Saturday! Forever a rock icon.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Next Weekend
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green will host the TRNSMT Festival from July 11-13, 2026, with a lineup of major artists.

angles.name: TRNSMT Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! TRNSMT Festival kicks off next weekend at Glasgow Green. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Glasgow Get Ready
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? TRNSMT Festival is almost here, bringing huge acts to the city next weekend!

moments.title: Wireless Festival Next Weekend
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival returns to Finsbury Park, London, from July 10-12, 2026, featuring top artists in hip-hop, grime, and R&B.

angles.name: Wireless Is Coming
angles.copy: Finsbury Park is about to get loud! Wireless Festival takes over London next weekend. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: Get ready, London! Wireless Festival is just days away. Who are you hoping to catch on stage?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK is well underway, with daily episodes bringing new couplings, dumpings, and plenty of drama from the villa.

angles.name: Villa Vibes
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's your favourite couple right now, and who's giving you the 'ick'?

angles.name: Recap & React
angles.copy: Catching up on Love Island UK? What a week it's been in the villa! Any predictions for tonight's episode?
